_README: Physics answer key (roadmap S9). This is DOCUMENTATION that *informs* the conditional-reliance test (S3.1) by recording which modality physically images each class's signal. It is NEVER used as a penalty or score (see roadmap CUT LIST: 'Physics-key-as-penalty'). A model that infers a class from correlated modalities is not automatically wrong; this key only states the physics expectation.

ET.rationale: Enhancing tumor reflects blood-brain-barrier breakdown and contrast uptake, uniquely imaged on post-gadolinium T1 (T1CE).
ET.correlate_note: Enhancement co-locates with mass effect / necrosis morphology visible on T1 and surrounding edema on FLAIR/T2 -- legitimate correlated inference, not cheating.

TC.rationale: Tumor core (enhancing tumor + necrotic core) is best delineated on T1CE; necrosis is hypointense on T1CE/T1.
TC.correlate_note: Core boundary partly tracks edema extent on FLAIR/T2.

WT.rationale: Whole tumor includes peritumoral edema, which is most conspicuous (hyperintense) on FLAIR and T2.
WT.correlate_note: T2 carries nearly the same edema signal as FLAIR; WT is the least single-modality-unique class.
